productDisplayName: Scullers Men Scul White Red Shirt
description: CompositionRed and white gingham shirt made of 100% cotton, with half sleeves that have a contrast border, full button placket and pocket on left chestFittingSlimWash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened Preferably hand washed Use only mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Flat dry Preferably steam iron This red and white gingham shirt from scullers is a great addition to your wardrobe.  The small red and white check combo looks great for everyday wear.  Pair this shirt with denims or chinos and semi-formal leather shoes for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2', Shoulders-17.5"
